faqs.question: How much does mosquito control cost in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Our mosquito control services in Castle Hill range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, treatment frequency, and infestation severity. We offer one-time treatments and seasonal packages to fit your budget and needs.

faqs.question: How often do I need mosquito treatments in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Most Castle Hill properties benefit from monthly treatments during mosquito season (May through September). Properties near Pugsley Creek or with significant standing water may require more frequent applications every 2-3 weeks for optimal protection.

faqs.question: Are mosquito treatments safe for children and pets in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Treated areas are typically safe for re-entry within 30 minutes to an hour after application dries, making them ideal for Castle Hill homes and backyards.

faqs.question: What areas of my Castle Hill property will you treat?
faqs.answer: We treat all mosquito harborage areas including lawns, shrubs, trees, under decks, along fence lines, and around foundations. Special attention is given to shaded areas and places near standing water common in Castle Hill yards, ensuring comprehensive protection throughout your property.
